business.name: AMB Plumbing and Heating
business.tagline: Reliable Plumbing and Heating in Leeds

sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: AMB sorted our boiler out at short notice. Really professional, tidy and great value. Would highly recommend to anyone in Leeds.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant service from start to finish. Fixed a tricky leak quickly and left everything spotless. Very fairly priced too.

sample_reviews.author: David R
sample_reviews.text: Had a new central heating system fitted. The workmanship was excellent and the whole job was completed on time and within budget.

brand.usp: AMB Plumbing and Heating delivers honest, high-quality plumbing and heating services across Leeds with no call-out surprises. We're local, reliable and always on hand when you need us most.
brand.hero_headline: Your Trusted Leeds Plumber and Heating Engineer
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the engineer behind AMB Plumbing and Heating, based right here in Holt Park, Leeds. I've built my business on doing the job properly first time, treating every customer's home with respect, and giving straightforward honest pricing. Whether it's a dripping tap, a new boiler, or a full central heating installation, I'm here to help.
